title: You are an expert resume writer with over 20 years of experience working with job seekers trying to land a role in biote…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
You are an expert resume writer with over 20 years of experience working with job seekers trying to land a role in biotech. Highlight the 3 most important responsibilities in this job description:
Full Job Description
About:

Epitope Diagnostics, Inc. is an ISO 13485 certified medical device manufacture company located in the Mira Mesa/Sorrento Valley biotech hub of San Diego. We specialize in development and manufacture of immunoassays for the global medical device and diagnostics industry. Our areas of interest includes gastrointestinal, cardiovascular, infectious and autoimmune disease, as well as tumors/cancers and calcium/bone metabolism.

Description:

The Research and Development Biochemist is a full-time, laboratory position. He or she will be responsible for the development of products from feasibility through product launch. They will develop reagents, formulations, and processes for new biomarkers. The candidate must have the ability to work accurately, efficiently and swiftly in a research and development lab.

The candidate must be able to meticulously follow standard operating procedures under GMP requirements and perform analyses of experiment results. Must be familiar with general laboratory equipment such as pipettes, shakers, water bath, etc. Sterile technique should be practiced.

The candidate should energetic, self-motivated, positive, and teachable. Must have a strong work ethic and be highly communicative. This is a laboratory position for candidates with less than five years working experience with room for growth. Candidates with strong laboratory equipment handling experience would be ideal.

Qualifications:

Bachelor's Degree from four-year college or university in Chemistry, Biochemistry, Biophysics, Bioengineering or a related field, or two years minimum of related experience and/or training, or equivalent combination of education and experience.

Basic algebraic, statistical and mathematical skills

Basic Chemistry or Biochemistry knowledge

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $58,000.00 - $68,000.00 per year

Benefits:

401(k) matching
Dental insurance
Health insurance
Paid time off
Schedule:

8 hour shift
Education:

Bachelor's (Preferred)
Experience:

Biochemistry: 1 year (Preferred)
Laboratory Experience: 1 year (Preferred)

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. Development of products from feasibility through product launch, including reagents, formulations, and processes for new biomarkers.
2. Meticulously following standard operating procedures under GMP requirements and performing analyses of experiment results while being familiar with general laboratory equipment and practicing sterile technique.
3. Demonstrating strong work ethic, communication skills, and laboratory equipment handling experience in a research and development lab setting.
